title: cattleya × zayrae
intro: Cattleya × zayrae, also known as the Cattleya x zayrae, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya aurorae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × zayrae are believed to include wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of fever, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
